bug.description: race condition on shared data accessed from multiple threads without synchronization

prompt:
There is a race condition on shared data accessed from multiple threads without synchronization downstream of function LL_ADC_StartCalibration in the targets/TARGET_STM/TARGET_STM32F0 subsystem.
The function is located at targets/TARGET_STM/TARGET_STM32F0/STM32Cube_FW/STM32F0xx_HAL_Driver/stm32f0xx_ll_adc.h:2827.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
